response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location_code : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR registration_code : varchar : FK
ATTR origin_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR scheduled_departure_date : date
ATTR scheduled_departure_time : time

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_surname : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code, crew_id, crew_role
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_role : varchar : PK

ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR passenger_name : varchar
ATTR passenger_surname : varchar

ENTITY Seat
PK flight_code, seat_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR seat_code : varchar : PK

REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=city_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1..N : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL FlightStatusLog -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1..N : FK=crew_id
REL Seat -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
